name: Chocolate Lovers Snack Mix
recipeIngredient: 3 cups White chocolate pretzels OR white yogurt pretzel sticks
2 cups Bite-size fudge cream wafers or wafer candy bars
1 cup Mini shortbread cookies with chocolate center
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients; toss gently.
2. Store in tightly covered container.
